MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication In The Alternative
Off Calendar Oct-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication In The Alternative.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

Off Calendar Oct-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Award Of Public Entity'S Defense Costs Under Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1038.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's unopposed Motion for Award of Public Entity's Defense Costs Under Code of Civil Procedure Section 1038 in the amount of $121,295.62 is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)
